step_rationale: Regulates endothelial and vascular protein targets; involved in hemostasis.
mechanism: miR-145-5p suppresses vascular targets that regulate endothelial barrier function and platelet activation during thromboinflammation.

references.title: Genome-wide identification of circulating-miRNA expression quantitative trait loci reveals the role of several miRNAs in the regulation of cardiometabolic phenotypes.
